mapper.select:
SELECT ID, MAC_CODE, MAC_NAME, MAC_TYPE_CODE, MAC_MODEL_CODE, DEPT_ID, IMEI, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME, MAC_MODEL_NAME, MAC_TYPE_NAME, IS_ELECTRON_FENCE FROM M_MACHINE
id = #{id}
select count(*) from T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_EQUIPMENT where EQUIPMENT_ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_MACHINE(ID, MAC_CODE, MAC_NAME, MAC_TYPE_CODE, MAC_MODEL_CODE, DEPT_ID, IMEI, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, MAC_MODEL_NAME, MAC_TYPE_NAME, IS_ELECTRON_FENCE ) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{macCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{macName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{macTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{macModelCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{imei, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{now}, #{macModelName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{macTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isElectronFence,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE M_MACHINE SET ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, MAC_CODE = #{macCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MAC_NAME = #{macName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MAC_TYPE_CODE = #{macTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MAC_MODEL_CODE = #{macModelCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEPT_ID = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, IMEI = #{imei,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}, MAC_MODEL_NAME = #{macModelName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MAC_TYPE_NAME = #{macTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_ELECTRON_FENCE = #{isElectronFence,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
id = #{id}
